narrative:
Archbold Three (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,011 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.2 percentage points.
